picks.rationale: GEV is up 58.52% YTD and 24.07% in the last month, with a 1D gain of +0.13%, a strong buy rating, and a very attractive P/E of 31.25 for this growth profile; Bank of America's warning of a US electricity shortfall amplifies SMR/pro-nuclear demand tailwinds. [public.com](https://public.com/stocks/vst/forecast-price-target)

DELL has surged 254.92% YTD with strong 1M (+21.74%) and 1W (+5.87%) momentum, supported by a P/E of 34.37 and positive news sentiment; the broader AI compute and server demand narrative continues as more upside drivers.

VRT is up 84.54% YTD and 15.31% in the last month, with 1D momentum of +1.77%, backed by strong_buy analyst consensus and a P/E of 79.98; power infrastructure demand from data centers is a key catalyst.

MXL shows explosive momentum with a 417.56% YTD gain and 33.15% in 1M, plus a 10.75% 1D surge, bolstered by a Stifel price target raise; despite negative 1W momentum (-14.76%), the strong fundamental story (low short interest 4.84%) remains intact.

VST delivered a 14.19% 1M gain and +2.33% 1D, with a P/E of 25.9, strong_buy rating, and news sentiment of 0.259 (beating market upswing per analysts); growing electricity demand from AI is a core driver for this nuclear-ops company. [public.com](https://public.com/stocks/vst/forecast-price-target)

P gained 21.69% in the last month and 4.59% in 1D, with a solid YTD of +17.32%; its high P/E of 117.33 is tempered by positive news sentiment of 0.567 and low short interest at 3.95%, driven by data center build-out catalysts (SMCI/DCBBS traction).

TLN is up 14.22% in the last month and 3.73% on the day, with a beta of 1.619 and a buy consensus; while lacking a P/E, its news sentiment is positive at 0.236 and nuclear SMR momentum (X-Energy related) keeps the stock attractive.

LEU is up 18.38% in the last month and 4.34% in 1W, with a 1D gain of 4.39%, supported by a news sentiment of 0.43; the uranium supply narrative and U.S. nuclear fuel push provide a strong catalyst despite a still negative YTD (-36.31%).
WDC has gained 17.95% in the last month and 208.11% YTD, with a P/E of 32.9, strong_buy rating, and positive news sentiment of 0.108; the memory sector rally continues to drive momentum.

RR. is up 20.01% YTD and 17.24% in 1M, with a P/E of 20.82 and positive news sentiment of 0.205; the small-cap nuclear play offers a balanced risk/reward with low beta of 1.203 and a dividend yield of 0.68%.

previous_picks.rationale: GEV is up +103% 1Y and +15.4% 1M with a P/E of 31, backed by a record backlog of $163B and 20% of orders tied to data centers. Web search results confirm strong AI power demand with a Chevron-Microsoft data center project using seven GE Vernova turbines, but the stock trades at a lofty 63x forward earnings, justifying a buy rather than a strong_buy.

DELL has a massive +229% YTD return, +235% 1Y, and a reasonable P/E of 33 with strong revenue and backlog in AI infrastructure. Recent gains of +4.1% 1M and +1.9% 1D show continued momentum, supported by political and AI attention.

CRDO is up +164% 1Y, +72% YTD, and has solid short-term momentum with a +10.9% 1M gain and positive news sentiment of 0.36. The strong headline from July 7 naming it a best growth stock supports the favorable outlook despite a high P/E of 105.

VRT is up +143% 1Y and +74% YTD, with strong analyst consensus (strong_buy, an_score 1.46) and a solid short-term bounce (+1.7% 1M). The data center cooling and power story remains intact, supported by a high EPS Rating of 98.

MXL has explosive growth with +476% 1Y and +364% YTD, plus positive 1M momentum of +8.3%. Despite elevated beta of 3.9 and no P/E, the buy rating from analysts (an_score 1.82) and strong news sentiment of 0.17 support inclusion.

META is a strong_buy with a low P/E of 22, positive 1M and 1W momentum (+5.3% and +9.4%), and a solid analyst score of 1.32. The dip from 1Y return of -15% provides a reasonable entry for a hyperscaler with AI tailwinds.

RR. has a +56% 1Y return, +21% YTD, and strong 1M momentum of +14.8% with a reasonable P/E of 21. The positive news sentiment of 0.21 and exposure to nuclear operations for AI data center power support continued growth.

VST has a strong_buy consensus (an_score 1.4) and positive 1M momentum of +6.2% despite a -18% 1Y return. The P/E of 26 is attractive for an AI power demand play, supported by news sentiment of 0.23 and analyst optimism on electricity demand.

LEU has a +3.4% 1W gain and +1.2% 1M momentum, with a buy rating and an analyst score of 1.75. News sentiment is positive at 0.26, and its inclusion in the S&P SmallCap 600 enhances visibility, despite a high P/E of 63 and short interest of 22%.

P has strong recent momentum with +8.2% 1W and +6.1% 1M gains, a +37% 1Y return, and positive news sentiment of 0.19. The buy rating with an an_score of 1.9 and a modest market cap of $26B offer a smaller-cap AI infrastructure growth opportunity.
